description: European-American prison and street gang formed in Long Beach, California in 1986, now based in Orange County. Involved in identity theft, credit card fraud, methamphetamine sales, drug trafficking, murder, assault, auto theft, burglary, and property crime. Has ties with the Aryan Brotherhood and Nazi Lowriders. Described by California DOJ in 2004 as one of the most powerful and fastest-growing gangs inside and outside prison.
